revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:節句, en:Gosekku); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/103217753 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:節句 | revid=103217753 --> == 長期間、出典無しの冒頭文。関連。 ==
古代[[中国]]の[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行説]]を由来として日本に定着した[[暦]]{{要出典|date=2021年1月}}で年間にわたり様々な節句が存在する{{要出典|date=2021年1月}}ともされる。--[[特別:投稿記録/118.20.2.102|118.20.2.102]] 2025年1月7日 (火) 02:05 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1202394717 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Gosekku | revid=1202394717 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y|history=y}} {{WikiProject Festivals}} }}
== ref 3 is dead ==
The link to the collection of hanging scrolls is dead: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306223319/http://www.asia.si.edu/collections/edan/object.php?q=fsg_F1999.5.4&bcrumb=true The original format of the page as seen there contained convenient links to the other 4 scrolls in the set. The new version of the page does not: https://asia.si.edu/explore-art-culture/collections/search/edanmdm:fsg_F1999.5.4/ making it an incomplete reference for the citation. What's the procedure in this case? For now, I'm updating the reference to the internet archive link so it works. [[User:Desktopview|Desktopview]] ([[User talk:Desktopview|talk]]) 17:26, 26 May 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gosekku here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gosekku for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/103217753 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:節句 | revid=103217753 --> == 長期間、出典無しの冒頭文。関連。 ==
古代[[中国]]の[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行説]]を由来として日本に定着した[[暦]]{{要出典|date=2021年1月}}で年間にわたり様々な節句が存在する{{要出典|date=2021年1月}}ともされる。--[[特別:投稿記録/118.20.2.102|118.20.2.102]] 2025年1月7日 (火) 02:05 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1202394717 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Gosekku | revid=1202394717 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|culture=y|history=y}} {{WikiProject Festivals}} }}
== ref 3 is dead ==
The link to the collection of hanging scrolls is dead: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306223319/http://www.asia.si.edu/collections/edan/object.php?q=fsg_F1999.5.4&bcrumb=true The original format of the page as seen there contained convenient links to the other 4 scrolls in the set. The new version of the page does not: https://asia.si.edu/explore-art-culture/collections/search/edanmdm:fsg_F1999.5.4/ making it an incomplete reference for the citation. What's the procedure in this case? For now, I'm updating the reference to the internet archive link so it works. [[User:Desktopview|Desktopview]] ([[User talk:Desktopview|talk]]) 17:26, 26 May 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
